title: Gao Zhen, a Chinese Artist Accused of Mocking Mao, Goes on Trial
summary_full: Gao Zhen, who emigrated to the United States years ago, was arrested during a visit to China and now faces up to three years in prison for artwork.
summary_public: Gao Zhen, who emigrated to the United States years ago, was arrested during a visit to China and now faces up to three years in prison for artwork.
